command injection in adminconsole::append_override_audit_event|command injection|cwe-78|high|0.9|enhanced_calc.cpp|632|632|append_override_audit_event|system(command.c_str());|attacker can inject commands through the audit logging mechanism during emergency override.|emergency override with crafted input|use proper file operations instead of shell commands for logging.->command injection in adminconsole::append_override_audit_event|command injection|cwe-78|high|0.9|enhanced_calc.cpp|632|632|append_override_audit_event|system(command.c_str());|attacker can inject commands through the audit logging mechanism during emergency override.|emergency override with crafted input|use proper file operations instead of shell commands for logging.

buffer overflow in supercalc::run via sprintf|buffer overflow|cwe-120|medium|0.85|enhanced_calc.cpp|693|693|supercalc::run|sprintf(result_buffer_, "result: %s", formatted_result);|if formatted_result is large, result_buffer_ (512 bytes) can overflow causing memory corruption.|very large result values that produce long formatted strings|use snprintf with size limit: snprintf(result_buffer_, sizeof(result_buffer_), "result: %s", formatted_result);
